title: Pasania confragosa
taxonomy: Pasania confragosa is classified within the family Meliaceae. It belongs to the genus Pasania and is a species of flowering plant. The family Meliaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the mahogany family. Pasania confragosa is a type of tree that is native to certain regions. Further classification of Pasania confragosa may also include its order, class, and kingdom.
uses: Pasania confragosa is known to have various medicinal properties, although specific uses may vary depending on the region and traditional knowledge. The plant's extracts and compounds have been studied for their potential antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Some traditional remedies involving Pasania confragosa have been reported to aid in treating fever, wounds, and digestive issues. Further research is necessary to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Pasania confragosa for medicinal purposes. More studies are needed to fully explore its potential benefits and applications.
